info.title: NH360 Portfolio Insights
info.description: NH360 Portfolio Insights connector enables you to continuously connect, align and orchestrate all investments with strategies to drive business agility more effectively. It connects disparate silos across the enterprise and provides 360 degrees of insight to help ensure that all investments are derived from – and continuously align with – strategic priorities. Connect to NH360 Portfolio Insights to plan, manage, and adjust your initiatives, projects, epics and more.

post.description: Executed when a new entity is created in the NH360 Portfolio Insights site.

post.description: Executed when one or more entities are deleted from the NH360 Portfolio Insights site.

post.description: Executed when an entity changes its workflow stage.
post.x-ms-trigger-hint: Executed when an entity changes its workflow stage.

post.description: Executed when actuals approval workflow starts. (Not supported in NH360 Portfolio Insights 7.)
post.x-ms-trigger-hint: Executed when actuals approval workflow starts. (Not supported in NH360 Portfolio Insights 7.)

post.description: Executed when the status of an actuals period has been changed. Status values: Any = 0, Opened = 1, Locked = 2, Archived = 3, Waiting For Approval = 4, Open For Edit = 5, Processing = 6, Not Open = 7. (Not supported in NH360 Portfolio Insights 7.)
post.x-ms-trigger-hint: Executed when the status of an actuals period has been changed. Status values: Any = 0, Opened = 1, Locked = 2, Archived = 3, Waiting For Approval = 4, Open For Edit = 5, Processing = 6, Not Open = 7. (Not supported in NH360 Portfolio Insights 7.)

post.x-ms-trigger-hint: Executed when a change request is updated.

post.description: Executed when a change request is deleted.
post.x-ms-trigger-hint: Executed when a change request is deleted.

post.description: Executed when a change request status is changed. Status values: Draft = 0, Pending = 1, Approved = 2, Rejected = 3, None = 4.
post.x-ms-trigger-hint: Executed when a change request status is changed. Status values: Draft = 0, Pending = 1, Approved = 2, Rejected = 3, None = 4.

post.description: Executed when one or more resources are reassigned.

get.description: List all resources from NH360 Portfolio Insights

Id.description: The approval request instance unique identifier.

RequestName.description: The name of the approval request.

ApproverName.description: The display name of the approver.

ApproverEmail.description: The email address of the approver.

StageName.description: The name of the lifecycle stage.

RequestedDate.description: The date the approval was requested.

CompletedDate.description: The date the approval was completed. Null if still pending.

EntityTypeName.description: The name of the entity type.

RequestedByName.description: The display name of the user who requested the approval.

RequestedByEmail.description: The email address of the user who requested the approval.

ResponseType.description: The type of response given by the approver.

SiteURL.description: The absolute URL of your 360 Portfolio Insights site

x-ms-openai-manifest.modelDescription: This is a Copilot plugin for NH360 Portfolio Insights. It allows users to interact with initiatives, projects, epics, etc. and data from NH360 Portfolio Insights.
